Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses By Plaintiff To (1) Form Interrogatories; (2) Special Interrogatories, And (3) Request For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY SABRINA BERDUX COHEN OF THE OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TEL NO. 415-554-3800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses By Plaintiff To (1) Form Interrogatories; (2) Special Interrogatories, And (3) Request For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.
